name: swatchbook-docs
description: Docs-site tokens. Mode (Light / Dark) picks surface + text + primary role tokens; brand (Default / ACME) re-aliases the primary role from the blue brand ramp to violet; typography picks the font-family baseline (Sans ⇒ system, Mono ⇒ monospace, Comic ⇒ comic stack); a11y=High-contrast bumps colour contrast via alias-indirected amber primary shades, bumps base size 8%, and bumps base font weight, independent of whichever typography context is active. Resolution order is mode → brand → typography → a11y so a11y gets the last word on every token it needs to influence.
